title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Wilderness Lodges India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Wilderness Lodges India
jsonLd.description:
We at Wilderness Lodges India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wilderness Lodges India:
Wilderness Lodges India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India!
